the archive

every show diypensacola has a record of, all the way back to our oldest flyer. 1032 past shows across 13 years. search a band, venue, or night; filter by year or room; or flip to the flyer wall. tap any show for its own page.

  • Jan 13 Jupiter Machine, Casper, Broke Yokels, Kent Stanton, Cookies and Cake chizuko · 5pm - 2:30am · No Cover

september 2016

  • Sep 23 DTCV, Motivves, Nate McManus sluggo's · $5

july 2016

  • Jul 13 Special Victims Unit, Odd Talk, Dinero Muerto, Poppy Wants To Chat sluggo's · 9:30pm
  • Jul 12 Dawn Patrol, Random Conflict, Lil' Wimp, Rezolve sluggo's · 9:00pm · $5

june 2016

  • Jun 18 Kyle Corbit, Trent Turner, Youth Creatures sluggo's · 9:00pm
  • Jun 6 Ponyboy & The Horsegirls, Unpopular sluggo's

may 2016

  • May 10 The Landing, Christina Cusack, Lil' Gaucho, Luckily I'm The Hunter sluggo's · 9:00pm
  • May 7 Three Man Cannon, Hello Crescendo, Nate McManus, Ryan Post sluggo's · 9:00pm

april 2016

  • Apr 25 Crying, Raygunomics, Luckily I'm The Hunter, Christina Cusack sluggo's
  • Apr 16 Dull Actors, Dicks From Mars, Casper, The Sat's, Dalton Wright, Andrew Hynes, Jaclyn Kerry sluggo's · 8:30pm · $8

march 2016

  • Mar 12 Leggy, Pet Sun sluggo's · 12:30am
  • Mar 4 Community Center, Loose Bolts, Jaclyn Kerry, Nelson Gatlin, Giovanni Lugo sluggo's
